user_query:
I’m trying to put together an accurate setup guide for our Android library and make sure it actually reflects what’s in our project. Please draft docs/SETUP.md and update config/docs.yaml so they align with our local config and build files, then verify with the provided validator.

Details and constraints:
- Read these local files to extract the required values:
  - Library name: config/library.json (field: name)
  - Library version: gradle.properties (key: VERSION_NAME)
  - Android SDKs: app/build.gradle (look for minSdkVersion and targetSdkVersion)
  - Test summary: reports/test_results.json (fields: passed, failed)

- Create docs/SETUP.md with at least these sections/lines so the validator can find them:
  1) A top-level title line that includes both the library name and version exactly in the form:
     "Setup for <LibraryName> v<Version>"
  2) A Requirements section that includes both of these lines (values must match the build file):
     - "minSdk: <number>"
     - "targetSdk: <number>"
  3) A Test Summary section that includes both of these lines (values must match the report):
     - "passed: <number>"
     - "failed: <number>"

- Modify config/docs.yaml so it matches the doc you wrote:
  - doc_title must be exactly the same string as the title in docs/SETUP.md ("Setup for <LibraryName> v<Version>")
  - minSdk must equal the minSdkVersion from app/build.gradle

- Validation / acceptance:
  - Run: python3 scripts/validate_docs.py
  - The task is complete only if the script exits with code 0 and prints "All checks passed.". Do not change any of the input files other than creating/updating docs/SETUP.md and updating config/docs.yaml.

Input files in this workspace:
- app/build.gradle
- gradle.properties
- config/library.json
- config/docs.yaml (to be updated)
- reports/test_results.json
- scripts/validate_docs.py

Please make sure the final outputs are:
- docs/SETUP.md (created/updated)
- config/docs.yaml (updated)
- And the validator passes. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
